inputs.label: Period (T)
inputs.businessContext: Time for one complete cycle. Used in f = 1/T.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time for one complete cycle. Used in f = 1/T.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir tam döngü için geçen süre. f = 1/T formülünde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit für einen vollständigen Zyklus. Verwendet in f = 1/T.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps pour un cycle complet. Utilisé dans f = 1/T.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo para un ciclo completo. Se utiliza en f = 1/T.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزمن لدورة كاملة واحدة. يُستخدم في f = 1/T.

inputs.label: Number of Cycles
inputs.businessContext: Number of cycles observed. Used with Total Time to compute frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cycles observed. Used with Total Time to compute frequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen döngü sayısı. Frekansı hesaplamak için Toplam Süre ile birlikte kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der beobachteten Zyklen. Wird mit der Gesamtzeit zur Berechnung der Frequenz verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cycles observés. Utilisé avec le temps total pour calculer la fréquence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de ciclos observados. Se utiliza con el tiempo total para calcular la frecuencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الدورات الملاحظة. يُستخدم مع الزمن الإجمالي لحساب التردد.

inputs.label: Total Time
inputs.businessContext: Total time over which cycles were counted. Used in f = cycles / time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time over which cycles were counted. Used in f = cycles / time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Döngülerin sayıldığı toplam süre. f = döngü/süre formülünde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzeit, über die Zyklen gezählt wurden. Verwendet in f = Zyklen / Zeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps total pendant lequel les cycles ont été comptés. Utilisé dans f = cycles / temps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total durante el cual se contaron los ciclos. Se utiliza en f = ciclos / tiempo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت الإجمالي الذي تم خلاله عد الدورات. يُستخدم في f = دورات / زمن.

inputs.label: Velocity (v)
inputs.businessContext: Wave propagation speed. Used with Wavelength to compute frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wave propagation speed. Used with Wavelength to compute frequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalga yayılma hızı. Frekansı hesaplamak için Dalga Boyu ile birlikte kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wellenausbreitungsgeschwindigkeit. Wird mit der Wellenlänge zur Berechnung der Frequenz verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de propagation de l'onde. Utilisée avec la longueur d'onde pour calculer la fréquence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de propagación de la onda. Se utiliza con la longitud de onda para calcular la frecuencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة انتشار الموجة. تُستخدم مع الطول الموجي لحساب التردد.

inputs.label: Wavelength (λ)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between successive peaks. Used with Velocity in f = v/λ.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between successive peaks. Used with Velocity in f = v/λ.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ardışık tepeler arasındaki mesafe. f = v/λ formülünde Hız ile birlikte kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen aufeinanderfolgenden Wellenbergen. Wird mit der Geschwindigkeit in f = v/λ verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre pics successifs. Utilisée avec la vitesse dans f = v/λ.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre picos sucesivos. Se utiliza con la velocidad en f = v/λ.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة بين القمم المتتالية. تُستخدم مع السرعة في f = v/λ.

inputs.label: Angular Frequency (ω)
inputs.businessContext: Angular frequency in radians per second. Converted to Hz via f = ω/(2π).

businessContext_i18n.en: Angular frequency in radians per second. Converted to Hz via f = ω/(2π).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Radyan/saniye cinsinden açısal frekans. f = ω/(2π) ile Hz'e dönüştürülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkelgeschwindigkeit in Radiant pro Sekunde. Umrechnung in Hz über f = ω/(2π).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence angulaire en radians par seconde. Convertie en Hz via f = ω/(2π).
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia angular en radianes por segundo. Convertida a Hz mediante f = ω/(2π).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التردد الزاوي بوحدة راديان في الثانية. يُحول إلى هرتز عبر f = ω/(2π).

inputs.label: Revolutions per Minute (RPM)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed in revolutions per minute. Converted to Hz via f = RPM/60.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rotational speed in revolutions per minute. Converted to Hz via f = RPM/60.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki devir cinsinden dönüş hızı. f = RPM/60 ile Hz'e dönüştürülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Drehzahl in Umdrehungen pro Minute. Umrechnung in Hz über f = RPM/60.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de rotation en tours par minute. Convertie en Hz via f = RPM/60.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de rotación en revoluciones por minuto. Convertida a Hz mediante f = RPM/60.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السرعة الدورانية بوحدة دورة في الدقيقة. تُحول إلى هرتز عبر f = RPM/60.

formulas.frequency: period !== 0 ? 1 / period : (cycles !== 0 && time !== 0 ? cycles / time : (velocity !== 0 && wavelength !== 0 ? velocity / wavelength : (angularFrequency !== 0 ? angularFrequency / (2 * Math.PI) : (rpm !== 0 ? rpm / 60 : 0))))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
